nasb.text: On one of the days while He was teaching the people in the temple and preaching the gospel, the chief priests and the scribes with the elders confronted Him,

esv.text: One day, as Jesus was teaching the people in the temple and preaching the gospel, the chief priests and the scribes with the elders came up

cnv.text: 有一天，耶穌在殿裡教導人，宣講福音，眾祭司長、經學家和長老上前來，

ccb.text: 有一天，耶稣正在圣殿里教导人、传讲福音，祭司长、律法教师和长老上前，

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，有一天耶稣在圣殿里教导民众、传福音的时候，祭司长们、经文士们和长老们一起上前来，
